mapper.select: SELECT 'workerHealthMgmtGuidelines' AS title ,'/WorkerHealthMgmtGuidelines' AS route ,'workerHealthMgmtGuidelinesDesc' AS description , case when workerHealthMgmtGuidelines.exist then 'Y' else 'N' end as activeYn FROM ( SELECT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM esg.tb_worker_health_guide thp WHERE thp.comp_id = #{compId} AND thp.write_year = #{searchText} ) as exist ) AS workerHealthMgmtGuidelines UNION ALL SELECT 'safetyMgmtGuidelines' AS title ,'/SafetyMgmtGuidelines' AS route ,'safetyMgmtGuidelinesDesc' AS description , case when safetyMgmtGuidelines.exist then 'Y' else 'N' end as activeYn FROM ( SELECT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM esg.tb_safety_checklist thp WHERE thp.comp_id = #{compId} AND thp.write_year = #{searchText} ) OR EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM esg.tb_safety_inspection_log WHERE write_year = #{searchText} AND comp_id = #{compId} ) OR EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM esg.tb_permit_to_work WHERE write_year = #{searchText} AND comp_id = #{compId} ) as exist ) AS safetyMgmtGuidelines UNION ALL SELECT 'workplaceSafetyGuidelines' AS title ,'/WorkplaceSafetyGuidelines' AS route ,'workplaceSafetyGuidelinesDesc' AS description , case when workplaceSafetyGuidelines.exist then 'Y' else 'N' end as activeYn FROM ( SELECT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM esg.tb_hazmat_checklist thp WHERE thp.comp_id = #{compId} AND thp.write_year = #{searchText} ) as exist ) AS workplaceSafetyGuidelines UNION ALL SELECT 'mgmtOfChange' AS title ,'/MgmtOfChange' AS route ,'mgmtOfChangeDesc' AS description , case when safetyMgmtGuidelines.exist then 'Y' else 'N' end as activeYn FROM ( SELECT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM esg.tb_mgmt_of_change thp WHERE thp.comp_id = #{compId} AND thp.write_year = #{searchText} ) as exist ) AS safetyMgmtGuidelines UNION ALL SELECT 'procurement' AS title ,'/Procurement' AS route ,'procurementDesc' AS description , case when procurement.exist then 'Y' else 'N' end as activeYn FROM ( SELECT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM esg.tb_partner_comp_info WHERE comp_id = #{compId} AND reg_dt <= #{searchText} || '1231' ) OR EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM esg.tb_contractor_investigation_form WHERE write_year = #{searchText} AND comp_id = #{compId} ) AS exist ) AS procurement
